system.armor: 6 (hard, warded, lacks vitals), 4 vs. black iron
system.damage: word of force d12+3 (_near_, _area_, _forceful_) or four fists d12+3 with advan- tage (_close_, _reach_, _forceful_)
system.specialQuality: ageless; immune to the elements; perceives thought and matter; omnilingual

selected: to hide evidence of their failure, even from themselves

system.moves:
- Sense and neutralize threats with cold precision
- Shift the environment to create or close an opening
- Seal or unseal: a door, a binding, a mouth, a secret, etc.
- Blaze suddenly with the blinding light of creation

They are an archon (page 302), forged by the First Creators to stand vigil over the Utterwell (page 252) and to act as a bulwark against the Things Below. They are Tcaventes, Shackle and Key. A flawless guardian. Or at least, they were. Over eons, even they succumbed to the whispers of the Things Below. The corruption leads to lapses of discipline that let their charges’ influence seep out through the Deeps. It amplifies their guilt, which leads to denial strong enough to drive Tcaventes mad.
